comments.text:
NEXT LEVEL INTRO
I'll admit I was nervous putting these shoes in your hands, consider the fashion icon that you are. I knew this would be a brutally honest review. I was not disappointed
We'll hopefully push a firmware update to improve Cinebench scores in the next week or so
Ground Orthogonal Locomotion Distance benchmarks might need some more testing examples
But overall I can't get over the sandal pitch. Linus. I put my SOLE into the design of this sneaker/sandal. I swear with the elastic laces they're hot sockable 😅
comments.author: @mkbhd

comments.text: This is one of these videos where you go ''Wow i'm so glad Linus invested an insane amount of money into the lab''
